text.title: Pricing Strategy Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable inputs to a rule from `01-core-rules.xml`. MANDATORY for every methodology — even flat ones — per F-066 DoD.

decision-tree.root-question: Cost floor known AND ≥10 WTP interviews AND founder authority?

branch.when: cost_floor_known == true AND interviews_count >= 10 AND founder_authority == true
